mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USER (USER_NUMBER, USER_ID, USER_PW, USER_NAME, USER_PHONE, USER_JOIN_DATE, USER_TYPE) VALUES (SEQ_USER_NUMBER.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, SYSDATE, '일반회원')
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER (USER_NUMBER, MEMBER_DOB, MEMBER_GENDER) VALUES ((SELECT MAX(USER_NUMBER) FROM TBL_USER), #{memberDob}, #{memberGender})

INSERT INTO TBL_USER (USER_NUMBER, USER_ID, USER_PW, USER_NAME, USER_PHONE, USER_JOIN_DATE, USER_TYPE) VALUES (SEQ_USER_NUMBER.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, SYSDATE, '기업회원')
INSERT INTO TBL_COMPANY_MEMBER (USER_NUMBER, COMPANY_NUMBER, COMPANY_MANAGER_STATE) VALUES ((SELECT MAX(USER_NUMBER) FROM TBL_USER), (SELECT MAX(COMPANY_NUMBER) FROM TBL_COMPANY), 'INACTIVE')
mapper.select: SELECT COMPANY_NUMBER FROM TBL_COMPANY_MEMBER WHERE USER_NUMBER = #{value}
SELECT C.COMPANY_STATE FROM TBL_COMPANY C JOIN TBL_COMPANY_MEMBER CM ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CM.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE CM.USER_NUMBER = #{value}
